name: space metric schema validator rejects a metric whose dimension is not in the five-value enum
command: mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics:\n  - {id: m, dimension: velocity, source: x, unit: x, reporting_window: 1d, privacy: local-only, opt_in: false}\n' > space/metrics.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/validate-metric-schema.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_dimension=velocity' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=satisfaction|performance|activity|collaboration|efficiency-and-flow' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
